data.body:
GAP: Also update report_check section (lines 611-612, non-verbose path). Replace unconditional report_check "ruff"/"mypy" calls with conditional:
  if [[ -n "$CMD_LINT" ]]; then
      report_check "lint" "lint" "$TIMEOUT_MYPY"
  else
      report_check "ruff" "ruff" "$TIMEOUT_RUFF"
      report_check "mypy" "mypy" "$TIMEOUT_MYPY"
  fi
Without this, when commands.lint is configured the lint result is never printed or tallied in the non-verbose default mode.
